message:
feat(store,command): add GETEX, SMISMEMBER, SUBSTR, BITOP, ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE

Implement 6 additional commands closing key parity gaps:
- GETEX: GET with EX/PX/EXAT/PXAT/PERSIST expiration options
- SMISMEMBER: multi-member set membership check
- SUBSTR: alias for GETRANGE (deprecated but used by clients)
- BITOP: AND/OR/XOR/NOT bitwise operations between strings
- ZUNIONSTORE: sorted set union with WEIGHTS/AGGREGATE support
- ZINTERSTORE: sorted set intersection with WEIGHTS/AGGREGATE support

Includes store methods (getex, smismember, bitop, zunionstore,
zinterstore, aggregate_scores helper), command handlers, dispatch
routing, and classify entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
